notes: Fallback cap rescue if the 2560-bucket rerun is still over cap or lands under cap with too little margin. 3584 to 2432 removes 1152 rows for about 85425 estimated compressed bytes at the current ratio.
purpose: Provide a stronger byte-margin fallback while preserving the same smaller-batch throughput branch.
success_criteria: Stay clearly under 16,000,000 bytes with about 10k to 15k bytes of margin if the 2560-bucket rescue proves too tight.
